title: Stub TSX/Rust + Blocker Register + Assumption Quarantine Ledger
public_claim: Stub TSX/Rust + Blocker Register + Assumption Quarantine Ledger is a source packet for this is the most implementation-ready of the mid-size packs: it ships not just docs but an actual numbered patch packet (directory 12_WorkflowSpine_Tranche_PatchPacket/) containing stub source files for six new React components plus a schema diff, a runtime TypeScript file, and a Rust command-shapes file.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
